prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-DS85IX55IDNPLJ-BL-Prez-Paper Product Type: BLANK_BOOK Brand (from catalog): IGE Innovative Internet Products Existing Title: Disappearing Presidential Paper Dissolving Message Memo Pad Description: The Presidential Disappearing Paper has become a staple among certain United States Government Officials. The Spy Paper looks like ordinary paper, but is unique in that it dissolves in just seconds when in contact with liquid. This will result in a useless, non-reconstructable mulch which is far more secured than the output of any standard shredder.

Never worry about those exposing the pitfalls of your presidency trying to uncover your secret Russian Relations affairs. The paper is ideal for those confidential notes that may need to "disappear" quickly with little advance notice. Search Terms: spy espionage secret disappear Features: - 32 Sheets Per Each Notepad - Dimensions: 5.5" x 8.5" - Size: Large - Made In The USA - Dissolves When Contacted With Liquid === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: IGE Innovative Disappearing Presidential Paper Notepad

openai.item_name: IGE Innovative Internet Products Large Disappearing Memo Pad

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dissolves In Seconds When Wet, 32 Sheets, 55 X 85 Inch, Made In USA, Secret Message Pad

openai.title_differentiation: 32 Sheets, 55" X 85", Made In USA, Dissolves In Liquid, Secure Secret Notes, Spy Paper, Instant Mulch
